Ground Truth:
exp(x) + log(y) - z = 2

Component functions:
  g1(x) = exp(x)
  g2(y) = log(y)
  g3(z) = -z


Fitted Equation:
(-0.708720633684404*x - 0.407589924490386*exp(1.72190411754984*x) + 0.654573542455848) + (0.220095757147865*y - 1.12520440940112)*(1.3803612461087*y - 2.17786618549679) + 1.45887140733213*z + 0.539199920968122 + 0.0046319836*(0.995737139799344*a + 0.0123211367158201)**2 = 0.0046
R²_ortho = 0.9959

Component functions:
  g1(x) = -0.708720633684404*x - 0.407589924490386*exp(1.72190411754984*x) + 0.654573542455848
  g2(y) = (0.220095757147865*y - 1.12520440940112)*(1.3803612461087*y - 2.17786618549679)
  g3(z) = 1.45887140733213*z + 0.539199920968122
  g4(a) = 0.0046319836*(0.995737139799344*a + 0.0123211367158201)**2
